steps.title: Use the cause signal
steps.content: The underlined portion says important characteristics of pneumatic diverticula tend not to fossilize. The next word, so, shows the result: paleontologists have relied on living bird studies in addition to fossil analysis.

steps.title: Reject invented effects
steps.content: Choice A says paleontologists questioned living-species studies, but the passage says they used them. Choice B invents disagreements. Choice C invents earlier misidentification. The underlined portion explains why researchers needed another approach to study characteristics that fossils do not preserve. The answer is D.
